description: Composition Blue pink round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, felt tape lining on the inside of the neck, and print on the chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Get rid of your blues by slipping into this t-shirt from lee. dress to kill the soft spots and look splendid with the contrast print on the solid chunk of colour. Create your own style statement with this stark tee, which looks fabuloulous when paired with jeans and sports shoes or sandals. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
